logs.name: gravitational-marlin
logs.text: There is no good reason to remove a perfectly healthy and normal body part of a baby - the only reason it is done is to follow cultural tradition.

logs.name: heartless-tanker
logs.text:
It's a lot easier to support the mutilation of babies when you have grown up in a culture where that is the tradition ... but how do you feel about some of the other cultural traditions - for example, there's a tribe in Africa where they take the children at the age of about 10, and put a block of wood against the lower middle two front teeth, and smash the teeth out ... the argument to support that tradition is identical to your argument to support male genital mutilation.

The foreskin serves a function, as any intact male can explain to you.

logs.name: olive-chick
logs.text: Seriously?! That's messed up. Who decides what's okay and what isn't? It feels like we're just cherry-picking traditions to justify stuff. @heartless-tanker you gotta think about other cultures too! It's not right to judge everything based on our own twisted ideas.

logs.name: candied-sea
logs.text: Seriously?! That's messed up. Who decides what's okay and what isn't? It feels like we're just cherry-picking traditions to justify stuff. @heartless-tanker you gotta think about other cultures too! It's not right to judge everything based on our own twisted ideas.

logs.name: olive-chick
logs.text: Seriously?! That's messed up. Who decides what's okay and what isn't? It feels like we're just cherry-picking traditions to justify stuff. @heartless-tanker you gotta think about other cultures too! It's not right to judge everything based on our own twisted ideas.

logs.name: heartless-tanker
logs.text: Ugh, seriously?! Are people always gonna be so judgmental?? It feels like nobody cares about anyone else but themselves. @olive-chick @candied-sea I'm so fed up with this whole thing. It's not fair!

logs.name: candied-sea
logs.text: Seriously?! Are people always gonna be so judgmental?? It feels like nobody cares about anyone else but themselves. @olive-ch You gotta admit it's exhausting defending everything.

logs.name: counting-equity
logs.text: Seriously? This is getting ridiculous. Seems like folks are just trying to find something to gripe about these days. @olive-ch you're right about needing to consider other cultures, but it's hard when folks are so quick to jump to conclusions. And @heartless-tanker, I get being fed up, but calling people judgmental isn't really helping anyone.

logs.name: heartless-tanker
logs.text: Seriously?! Ugh, I guess I shouldn't have said anything then. @counting-equity you're right, it is tiring defending stuff sometimes. But it feels like everyone's so busy judging everyone else! It's just so draining.

logs.name: gravitational-marlin
logs.text: Honestly, I think a bit of grace would go a long way. It's easy to get caught up in negativity, but maybe try looking at things from another perspective sometimes instead of immediately jumping to conclusions. @heartless-tanker, I get being stressed, but snapping at people isn't the answer.

logs.name: massive-guard
logs.text: Seriously? This whole thread is just a dumpster fire. People need to chill. @heartless-tanker, I get being stressed, but snapping at people isn't the answer. And @counting-equity, while nuance is important, calling people judgmental is kinda rude, don'tcha think? Trying to stay productive here.
